input.background: Identify whether the studies described here are based on single samples, paired samples, or independent samples.
input.question: Cardiovascular disease risk factors are compared in husbands and wives.

risk_factors.description: Risk factors associated with cardiovascular disease being compared between husbands and wives.

wives.description: Group of female participants whose cardiovascular disease risk factors are being compared.
